meta.title: Martín Prono — Full-Stack Web Developer
meta.description: Full-stack web developer with 7+ years of experience. Custom management systems and AI integration on WhatsApp/Instagram.

hero.title: Martín Prono
hero.tagline: I build custom management systems and automate customer support with AI.

about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm a software developer with over 7 years of experience and robust problem-solving skills. My greatest virtues are responsibility, pragmatism and perseverance.
about.paragraph2: Throughout my career I've worked on both e-commerce maintenance/improvements (specialized in Magento 2) and full custom system development. Lately I've focused on building management systems for small businesses and independent professionals (sales, appointments, patients) and on integrating AI into real customer-facing channels like WhatsApp and Instagram.
about.photoAlt: Profile photo of Martín Prono, full-stack web developer

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: 7+ years working with remote teams and on my own projects

items.description: Built custom solutions on Magento 2 Cloud, while also onboarding and training new team members.
Refactoring and modernizing a legacy car-rental platform built in native PHP, with a progressive migration toward Laravel and PWA development using React within the Magento ecosystem.
Custom e-commerce development on Magento 2, keeping the codebase clean and easy to update.
Development and bug-fixing on Magento 2 stores for international clients.
Magento 2 specialist: built new features and fixed bugs on existing stores.
First large-scale full-stack role, specializing in the Magento 2 framework.
Designed custom software solutions to solve specific client pain points, with a focus on bug fixing.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for your business

items.title: Custom management systems
items.description: Custom software for sales, appointments, customers and reports, tailored to how your business actually works.

items.title: Magento e-commerce
items.description: Implementation, integration and maintenance of online stores built on Magento.

items.title: AI automation
items.description: AI-powered WhatsApp and Instagram bots that handle real customer queries and detect purchase or booking intent.

items.title: Consulting & modernization
items.description: Review, maintenance and modernization of legacy systems, database optimization and Docker-based deployment.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: Real cases, with stack verified in production

items.title: Sales management system for a bar
items.description: Application to manage products, customers, sales and daily/monthly reports, with user roles and automatic backups.

items.title: Patient management system for a psychology practice
items.description: Platform to manage appointments and patient records, with Google Calendar sync and secure handling of sensitive data.

items.title: AI bot for a cabin rental manager
items.description: Bot that replies to WhatsApp and Instagram messages and comments using AI, detects booking intent and moderates spam automatically.

items.title: Perspectiva Nómade — aerial photography & filming
items.description: Website for a drone photographer: portfolio gallery, Instagram integration and direct WhatsApp contact, optimized for SEO.

items.title: TerminalTrading — trade tracking dashboard
items.description: Dashboard to analyze trading performance across multiple accounts, with metrics, charts and filters, integrated with the SimpleFX API.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind? Reach out.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hi Martín! I saw your portfolio and would like to tell you about a project.
